no_access_limit.message: Indurent projects limited to 2 No-Access items maximum. Additional areas require surveyor to arrange re-visit.
no_access_limit.description: Strict No-Access limit per client requirements

presumed_samples.message: Indurent requires presumed samples for all ACM. No exceptions allowed.
presumed_samples.description: All ACM must have presumed status set

photo_requirements.description: Minimum 3 photos required including front sheet photo

scope_requirements.description: Detailed scope required for Indurent projects

special_validations.description: Verify all ACM items marked as presumed

metadata.notes: Strict validation rules for Indurent property surveys. No-Access limit and presumed samples are critical requirements.
